title: Arrabidaea candicans
taxonomy: Arrabidaea candicans is classified within the family Bignoniaceae. This family is commonly known as the trumpet vine or catalpa family. The genus Arrabidaea belongs to this family, and it is native to Central and South America. Arrabidaea candicans is a species of flowering plant within this genus. The classification of Arrabidaea candicans reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the Bignoniaceae family.
